title: Making a Doctor's Appointment by Phone
prompt: Practice making a phone call to schedule a doctor's appointment. Use polite phrases and provide your reason for the visit.
hint: Start with 'Hello, I would like to make an appointment, please.' Mention your symptoms or reason briefly. Confirm the date and time offered.
sample: Hello, I would like to make an appointment to see the doctor, please. I have a sore throat and a cough. Does 10:30 AM tomorrow work?

ja.prompt: 医者の予約を電話で取る練習をしましょう。丁寧な表現を使い、受診理由を簡単に伝えてください。
ja.hint: 'Hello, I would like to make an appointment, please.'（こんにちは、予約を取りたいのですが）から始めましょう。症状や理由を簡単に伝え、提案された日時を確認してください。
ja.sample: Hello, I would like to make an appointment to see the doctor, please. I have a sore throat and a cough. Does 10:30 AM tomorrow work?

zh.prompt: 練習打電話預約看醫生。使用禮貌用語並簡短說明看診原因。
zh.hint: 以「Hello, I would like to make an appointment, please.」開頭。簡述症狀或原因，並確認對方提供的日期和時間。
zh.sample: Hello, I would like to make an appointment to see the doctor, please. I have a sore throat and a cough. Does 10:30 AM tomorrow work?

title: Checking In at the Clinic Reception
prompt: Practice checking in at the clinic by telling the receptionist your appointment time and name. Be ready to show your ID and insurance card.
hint: Say 'Hello, I have an appointment with Dr. Smith at 10:30 AM. My name is [Your Name].' Have your photo ID and insurance card ready.
sample: Hello, I have an appointment with Dr. Smith at 10:30 AM. My name is Anna.

ja.prompt: クリニックの受付でチェックインする練習をしましょう。予約時間と名前を伝え、IDと保険証を準備してください。
ja.hint: 'Hello, I have an appointment with Dr. Smith at 10:30 AM. My name is [Your Name].'（こんにちは、10時30分にスミス先生の予約があります。私の名前は[名前]です）と言いましょう。写真付きIDと保険証を用意してください。
ja.sample: Hello, I have an appointment with Dr. Smith at 10:30 AM. My name is Anna.

zh.prompt: 練習在診所櫃檯報到，告訴櫃檯你的預約時間和姓名。準備好出示身分證和保險卡。
zh.hint: 說「Hello, I have an appointment with Dr. Smith at 10:30 AM. My name is [你的名字].」並準備好你的照片ID和保險卡。
zh.sample: Hello, I have an appointment with Dr. Smith at 10:30 AM. My name is Anna.

title: Describing Symptoms to the Doctor
prompt: Practice describing your symptoms clearly to the doctor. Include what the symptom is, when it happens, and how severe it is.
hint: Use phrases like 'I have a headache' and 'On a scale of one to ten, my pain is a seven.' Mention any other symptoms like cough or fever.
sample: I have a strong headache. On a scale of one to ten, my pain is a seven. I also have a dry cough and a fever of 38.5 degrees Celsius.

ja.prompt: 医者に症状をはっきりと説明する練習をしましょう。症状の内容、いつ起きるか、どのくらいの重さかを含めてください。
ja.hint: 'I have a headache'（頭痛があります）や 'On a scale of one to ten, my pain is a seven.'（痛みは1から10のうち7です）などの表現を使いましょう。咳や熱など他の症状も伝えてください。
ja.sample: I have a strong headache. On a scale of one to ten, my pain is a seven. I also have a dry cough and a fever of 38.5 degrees Celsius.

zh.prompt: 練習向醫生清楚描述你的症狀。包含症狀是什麼、何時發生、嚴重程度。
zh.hint: 使用「I have a headache」和「On a scale of one to ten, my pain is a seven」等句型。也提及其他症狀如咳嗽或發燒。
zh.sample: I have a strong headache. On a scale of one to ten, my pain is a seven. I also have a dry cough and a fever of 38.5 degrees Celsius.

title: Understanding the Doctor's Diagnosis and Treatment
prompt: Practice listening to the doctor's diagnosis and treatment plan. Ask questions if you do not understand medical terms or instructions.
hint: If you don't understand a word, say 'I'm sorry, I don't understand that word. Could you please explain it?' Confirm instructions by repeating them back.
sample: Doctor, could you please explain what the flu is? So I should rest and drink plenty of fluids, right?

ja.prompt: 医者の診断と治療計画を聞いて理解する練習をしましょう。わからない専門用語や指示があれば質問してください。
ja.hint: わからない言葉があれば、'I'm sorry, I don't understand that word. Could you please explain it?'（すみません、その言葉がわかりません。説明していただけますか？）と言いましょう。指示は繰り返して確認しましょう。
ja.sample: Doctor, could you please explain what the flu is? So I should rest and drink plenty of fluids, right?

zh.prompt: 練習聽懂醫生的診斷和治療計畫。如不懂醫學用語或指示，請提問。
zh.hint: 如果不懂某個詞，說「I'm sorry, I don't understand that word. Could you please explain it?」並重複指示確認。
zh.sample: Doctor, could you please explain what the flu is? So I should rest and drink plenty of fluids, right?

title: Buying Medicine at the Pharmacy
prompt: Practice asking for medicine at the pharmacy. Mention the medicine recommended by the doctor and ask for advice on how to take it.
hint: Say 'My doctor recommended ibuprofen and throat lozenges. Could you please show me where they are?' Ask about dosage and side effects if needed.
sample: Hi, my doctor recommended I get some ibuprofen and throat lozenges. Could you please show me where they are? Should I take the ibuprofen with food?

ja.prompt: 薬局で薬を買う練習をしましょう。医者に勧められた薬を伝え、服用方法について質問してください。
ja.hint: 'My doctor recommended ibuprofen and throat lozenges. Could you please show me where they are?'（医者にイブプロフェンとトローチを勧められました。どこにあるか教えてください）と言いましょう。用量や副作用についても質問できます。
ja.sample: Hi, my doctor recommended I get some ibuprofen and throat lozenges. Could you please show me where they are? Should I take the ibuprofen with food?

zh.prompt: 練習在藥局買藥。說出醫生推薦的藥，並詢問服用方式。
zh.hint: 說「My doctor recommended ibuprofen and throat lozenges. Could you please show me where they are?」如有需要可問用量和副作用。
zh.sample: Hi, my doctor recommended I get some ibuprofen and throat lozenges. Could you please show me where they are? Should I take the ibuprofen with food?
